title: I Am Fully Capable of Holding Great Wealth
subtitle: An affirmation for building trust in your own ability to manage significant money
excerpt: A brief affirmation from Day 65 of a 12-week money program. The statement addresses the specific doubt that large financial numbers can carry: the question of whether you are capable of handling significant money well. Use it when the idea of wealth brings uncertainty about your own readiness.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 65 reframe theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

content.text: A brief affirmation for the Day 65 question: not whether money will arrive, but whether you are ready for it. The specific doubt it addresses is capability, the worry that significant wealth would be mishandled, mismanaged, or simply beyond what you know how to hold.
Say it three times in the morning. Let the second line settle before you move to the third.
I am fully capable of holding great wealth. I make calm, wise decisions with money. I trust myself completely with significant financial responsibility.
The third line is the one most likely to produce resistance. If it does, that's where the work is. Stay with it rather than moving past it quickly.
Adapted from the Day 65 reframe theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
